updates.title: NSC interest rate at 7.7% for April–June 2026: Key features, returns and rules explained
updates.summary: The NSC interest rate for 2026 remains unchanged for the April to June quarter, offering higher returns than many fixed deposit schemes, thereby reinforcing its appeal as a stable, government-backed small savings scheme with fixed returns and tax benefits.

updates.title: Will you have to pay higher TDS on your FD, RD interest? What the new Income Tax Act says
updates.summary: The Income Tax Department clarified TDS on bank interest, creating confusion among investors regarding Fixed Deposits. Section 194A dictates TDS rules, with banking companies exempt from TDS on interest below specified thresholds.&nbsp;
updates.user_impact: May affect your tax liability or filing process
updates.content_angle: Educational explainer on this taxation development

updates.title: Income tax rules for senior citizens in FY27: What’s new and what stays the same
updates.summary: Senior citizens enjoy tax benefits such as higher exemption limits and deductions under the old regime. While the new regime standardizes limits, retirees can still claim deductions under various sections. Form No. 125 simplifies filing for eligible seniors, exempting them from Income Tax Returns.
updates.user_impact: May affect your tax liability or filing process
updates.content_angle: Educational explainer on this taxation development

updates.title: Govt mulls customs duty relief on cotton import to support textile industry
updates.summary: Raw cotton imports into India attract a 5% basic customs duty. The government had exempted the commodity from import duty from 19 August to 30 September 2025. This was later extended till 31 December 2025.
